<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>骈俪</x-hw><x-pr> piánlì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>指文章的排偶句式<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>吃硬不吃软</x-hw><x-pr> chīyìngbùchīruǎn</x-pr>比喻在和人交际中不听好言相劝，只有对方使出强硬手段才顺从<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>宫扇</x-hw><x-pr> gōngshàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>名</x-gram>古时宫廷仪仗的一种，皇帝宝座后面交叉着的又叫障扇<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>名</x-g> 团扇。古代宫中多用，故称<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>赏封</x-hw><x-pr> shǎngfēng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>赏金。多用红封套装或用红纸包<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>朔月</x-hw><x-pr> shuòyuè</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>新月②<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>卡钳</x-hw><x-pr> kǎqián</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>一种测量尺寸的量具。有两个可以开合的卡脚。分内卡钳和外卡钳两种。内外卡钳分别用于测量工件的内直径和外直径及其他表面尺寸<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>宽旷</x-hw><x-pr> kuānkuàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>宽阔空旷<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>宽旷</x-key>的操场</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>死契</x-hw><x-pr> sǐqì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>房地产买卖双方立下的不能（让卖主）赎回的契约（跟“活契”相区别）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

整式 zhěngshì
名若干字母和数字经过有限次加、减、乘和乘方运算的代数式。如：a2＋b2、c＋＋（ab）2等。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>新诉</x-hw><x-pr> xīnsù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>原告方起诉后又向法庭追加的新的诉讼请求（与“原诉”相区别）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

貉绒 háoróng
名去掉硬毛的貉子皮，质地十分柔软。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>簸 <x-g>动</x-g> </x-hw><x-pr> bǒdòng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>上下颠动<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>路不平，卡车一路不停地<x-key>簸动</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>死校</x-hw><x-pr> sǐjiào</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>完全按原稿进行校对（跟“活校”相对）<x-f>。</x-f></dt><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>“校”这里不读 xiào<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>编拟</x-hw><x-pr> biānnǐ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>编写，起草<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>编拟</x-key>《软件用户手册》<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

飘撒 piāosǎ
动飘扬着徐徐撒落。
雪花漫天飘撒 | 空中飘撒着片片羽毛。
用法说明跟“飘洒”不同。“飘撒”的对象为固体；“飘洒”的对象为液体。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>筛除</x-hw><x-pr> shāichú</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>经过筛选除去（不需要的东西）<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>出厂前，不合格的产品全<x-key>筛除</x-key>了<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>蜂糕</x-hw><x-pr> fēnggāo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>切开后断面呈蜂窝状的食品。用发酵的面粉或米粉加糖等蒸成<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>玩<x-er>儿</x-er>票</x-hw><x-pr> wánrpiào</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>票友参加戏曲表演<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 比喻做非本职的工作<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>这几年，他突然<x-key>玩儿票</x-key>搞起了文艺创作<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>煞笔</x-hw><x-pr> shābǐ</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>（写文章、书信等）结束；停笔<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>就此<x-key>煞笔</x-key></x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>名</x-g> 文章等的末尾部分<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>戏的<x-key>煞笔</x-key>很精彩</x-ex></dd><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>不宜写作“杀笔”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>斗眼</x-hw><x-pr> dòuyǎn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>内斜视的俗称<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>冷厉</x-hw><x-pr> lěnglì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>冷漠严厉<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>神情<x-key>冷厉</x-key></x-ex></dd>

奇零 jīlíng〈文〉
名大数目后边的尾数。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>游禽</x-hw><x-pr> yóuqín</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>会游水的一类鸟。趾间多有蹼，通常在水上生活，吃鱼、虾等。如雁、鸳鸯、野鸭等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>风障</x-hw><x-pr> fēngzhàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>插在园田、苗圃等旁边挡风护苗的屏障，多用芦苇、高粱秆等编扎而成<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>蚕蚁</x-hw><x-pr> cányǐ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>从蚕卵孵化出来的黑色幼蚕，小如蚂蚁<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说蚁蚕<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>告竭</x-hw><x-pr> gàojié</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>（财物、资源等）用尽<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>粮草<x-key>告竭</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>裂眦</x-hw><x-pr> lièzì</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>眼角睁裂<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>慑伏</x-hw><x-pr> shèfú</x-pr>现在一般写作“慑服”<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

仓庚 cānggēng
名黄鹂。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>彩牌楼</x-hw><x-pr> cǎipáilou</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用彩纸、彩绸、树枝、鲜花等装饰的牌楼。用于喜庆、纪念等活动<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>篇子</x-hw><x-pr> piānzi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>篇②<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>歌<x-key>篇子</x-key></x-ex><x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb>习题<x-key>篇子</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>金煌煌</x-hw><x-pr> jīnhuánghuáng</x-pr>
<dt>现在一般写作“金晃晃”<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>起赃</x-hw><x-pr> qǐzāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>从窝藏的地方把赃款、赃物搜查出来<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>立刻派人到窝主家中<x-key>起赃</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>平籴</x-hw><x-pr> píngdí</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>旧指官府在丰年按平价购进粮食，以备荒年出售<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>落晖</x-hw><x-pr> luòhuī</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>落日的余晖；夕阳<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>彰彰</x-hw><x-pr> zhāngzhāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>昭彰<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>用意<x-key>彰彰</x-key></x-ex></dd>

瓜代 guādài
动《左传·庄公八年》记载：春秋时齐襄公让连称和管至父两人去守卫葵丘，当时正值瓜熟季节，便与他们约定“及瓜而代”，即等明年瓜熟时再派人来接替他们。后来就用“瓜代”指任期届满时换人接替。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>俚歌</x-hw><x-pr> lǐgē</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>民间通俗歌谣<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>垂名</x-hw><x-pr> chuímíng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>名声留传<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>垂名</x-key>千古</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>炉条</x-hw><x-pr> lútiáo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>安置在炉膛下方承放固体燃料的铁条，作用与炉箅子相同<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>临月</x-hw><x-pr> línyuè</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>指怀孕足月，将要分娩<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>出月子</x-hw><x-pr> chūyuèzi</x-pr>
<dt>产妇分娩后满一个月<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>还没<x-key>出月子</x-key>，千万别干重活<x-er>儿</x-er><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>冬耕</x-hw><x-pr> dōnggēng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>冬季翻耕农田<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>蛀齿</x-hw><x-pr> zhùchǐ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>龋（qǔ）齿<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>阑入</x-hw><x-pr> lánrù</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>进入不该进入的地方；加入不适宜的内容<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>阑入</x-key>内宫</x-ex><x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb>乘隙<x-key>阑入</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>纱橱</x-hw><x-pr> shāchú</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>糊有冷布或钉有铁纱等的储存食物等的橱柜<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>跨线桥</x-hw><x-pr> kuàxiànqiáo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>横跨在其他交通线路上方的桥形道路<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>暗场</x-hw><x-pr> ànchǎng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>戏剧中处理部分情节的一种特殊方式。这些情节不在舞台上表演，而由台词或音响效果等交代。也指这些不在舞台上表演的情节<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>话剧《雷雨》中的不少情节是由<x-key>暗场</x-key>处理的<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>捞摸</x-hw><x-pr> lāomo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>在水里搜寻；借指寻求非分的好处<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>巡医</x-hw><x-pr> xúnyī</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>巡回医疗<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>下乡<x-key>巡医</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>仿影</x-hw><x-pr> fǎngyǐng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>放在仿纸下面照着写的样字，供初学写毛笔字的人使用<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>谐戏</x-hw><x-pr> xiéxì</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>用诙谐的话语逗笑<x-er>儿</x-er><x-f>。</x-f><dd><x-ex><x-key>谐戏</x-key>之言何必当真<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>黜退</x-hw><x-pr> chùtuì</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>罢免；斥退<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>任用君子，<x-key>黜退</x-key>小人<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>顾恋</x-hw><x-pr> gùliàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>挂念；眷恋<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>顾恋</x-key>家乡的亲人</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>乌涂</x-hw><x-pr> wūtu</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>形</x-gram>（饮用水）不热也不凉<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>我就不喜欢喝<x-key>乌涂</x-key>水<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn> <x-g>形</x-g> 形容不爽快；不利索<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>有话直说，别这么<x-key>乌涂</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>宠溺</x-hw><x-pr> chǒngnì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>过于宠爱；溺爱<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>这样<x-key>宠溺</x-key>孩子，很不好!</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>担名</x-hw><x-pr> dānmíng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>承担名义<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>父亲<x-key>担名</x-key>贷款让儿子搞养殖<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>稻螟</x-hw><x-pr> dàomíng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>水稻钻心虫。包括三化螟、二化螟等。幼虫蛀食稻苗和茎，造成枯心、白穗<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>戽斗</x-hw><x-pr> hùdǒu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>汲水灌田的旧式农具，外形像斗，两边系绳。操作时，两人对站拉绳汲水<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>奋袂</x-hw><x-pr> fènmèi</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>用力地挥动袖子，表示决心行动起来<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>奋袂</x-key>而去</x-ex></dd>

碴口 chákǒu
名物体破损或断裂处。
碴口很新，可见是刚刚折断的。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>娇甜</x-hw><x-pr> jiāotián</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>（话音或歌声）娇柔甜美<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>粉连纸</x-hw><x-pr> fěnliánzhǐ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>一种较薄的半透明白纸。可蒙在字画上进行描摹<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>阻留</x-hw><x-pr> zǔliú</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>阻挡使停留<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>遇到台风，在海口被<x-key>阻留</x-key>了三天</x-ex><x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb>他要走，怎么也<x-key>阻留</x-key>不住<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

蟠曲 pánqū
现在规范词形写作“盘曲”。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>酒帘</x-hw><x-pr> jiǔlián</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>旧时酒店门前挂的幌子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说酒望、酒旗<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>乳畜</x-hw><x-pr> rǔchù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>为产奶而饲养的牲畜，如乳牛、乳用山羊等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>榫眼</x-hw><x-pr> sǔnyǎn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>卯眼<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>背篼</x-hw><x-pr> bēidōu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>背（bēi）在背（bèi）上装东西的篼子，多用竹、籐、柳条等编制而成<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>鱼鼓</x-hw><x-pr> yúgǔ</x-pr>
<dt>现在一般写作“渔鼓”<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

荡除 dàngchú
动清除。
荡除陈规陋习

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>红点颏</x-hw><x-pr> hóngdiǎnké</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>歌鸲（qú）的一种。雄鸟喉部羽毛鲜红，眼上条纹白色；雌鸟喉部白色，眼上条纹淡黄色。叫声好听，是食虫益鸟<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说红靛颏<x-er>儿</x-er>、红喉歌鸲<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>推故</x-hw><x-pr> tuīgù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>副</x-gram>借故<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>推故</x-key>退席</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>图囊</x-hw><x-pr> túnáng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>装地图用的袋子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>恐水病</x-hw><x-pr> kǒngshuǐbìng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>狂犬病<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>子畜</x-hw><x-pr> zǐchù</x-pr>
<dt>现在一般写作“仔畜”<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>耕具</x-hw><x-pr> gēngjù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>耕地用的犁、耙等农具<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>不摸门<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> bùmōménr</x-pr>
<dt>不了解做事的诀窍；没有掌握解决问题的途径<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>对这项工作我还<x-key>不摸门儿</x-key>，需要有个熟悉过程<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>锋口</x-hw><x-pr> fēngkǒu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>刀、剑等器物的锐利部分<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>查截</x-hw><x-pr> chájié</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>检查并扣留（非法人员或物资）<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>查截</x-key>了一艘走私海轮<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>销歇</x-hw><x-pr> xiāoxiē</x-pr>
<dt>现在一般写作“消歇”<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>回聘</x-hw><x-pr> huípìn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>返聘<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>二乎</x-hw><x-pr> èrhu</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>因害怕而退缩；动摇<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>不论多么危险，咱们也不能<x-key>二乎</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 犹豫不定<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>你把我说<x-key>二乎</x-key>了</x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>③</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 计划、指望等可能落实不了<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>调动工作的事要<x-key>二乎</x-key>了<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>不宜写作“二忽”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>仿单</x-hw><x-pr> fǎngdān</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>介绍商品性质、规格、用途、用法的说明书<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>脱档</x-hw><x-pr> tuōdàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>某种商品生产或销售暂时中断<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>这种零件市场上刚刚<x-key>脱档</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>望板</x-hw><x-pr> wàngbǎn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>平铺在屋顶椽子上面的木板<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>琅嬛</x-hw><x-pr> lánghuán</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>传说中的仙境<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>琅嬛</x-key>福地</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>诳骗</x-hw><x-pr> kuángpiàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>用谎言来欺骗<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>诳骗</x-key>世人</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>闹戏</x-hw><x-pr> nàoxì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>指以丑角为主角的戏曲。多用滑稽有趣的人物和引人发笑的情节，来讽刺某些社会现象<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>挡位</x-hw><x-pr> dǎngwèi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>排挡装置中标示车速或倒车状态的位置<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>切换<x-key>挡位</x-key></x-ex><x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb><x-key>挡位</x-key>开关</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>扮酷</x-hw><x-pr> bànkù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>装扮出很时髦的样子<x-f>（</x-f>酷：英语cool音译<x-f>）</x-f><x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>抽薹</x-hw><x-pr> chōutái</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>（油菜、大蒜、韭菜等）从心叶中间长出花茎来<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>韭菜已经<x-key>抽薹</x-key></x-ex></dd><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>“薹”不要误写作“苔”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>漏票</x-hw><x-pr> lòupiào</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>逃票<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>蓄志</x-hw><x-pr> xùzhì</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>怀有某种志向或志愿<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>蓄志</x-key>改革</x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>名</x-g> 怀有的某种志向或志愿<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>蓄志</x-key>高远</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>潮干</x-hw><x-pr> cháogān</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>物体不很干燥，仍带有点<x-er>儿</x-er>潮气<x-f>。</x-f><dd><x-ex>衣服刚<x-key>潮干</x-key>，还得再晒一晒<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>周严</x-hw><x-pr> zhōuyán</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>周密而严谨<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>周严</x-key>的思考</x-ex><x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb>防备如此<x-key>周严</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>息讼</x-hw><x-pr> xīsòng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>平息争讼；停止打官司<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

软资源 ruǎnzīyuán
名指不同于矿产、水力等自然资源的科技、信息资源。在生产力发展中，软资源起着自然资源不可替代的重要作用。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>反推力</x-hw><x-pr> fǎntuīlì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>跟推动力方向相反的力<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>铆劲<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> mǎojìnr</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>鼓足力气，猛然使出来<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>大家一<x-key>铆劲儿</x-key>就把洞口撬开了</x-ex><x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb>铆足劲<x-er>儿</x-er>干</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>后尾<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> hòuyǐr</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>末尾；后面<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>个子矮的排在<x-key>后尾儿</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>“尾”这里不读 wěi<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>轻悠悠</x-hw><x-pr> qīngyōuyōu</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>形</x-gram>形容轻轻飘动的样子<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>小船在水面上<x-key>轻悠悠</x-key>地漂荡<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn> <x-g>形</x-g> （声音）轻柔悠扬<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>夜风中飘来<x-key>轻悠悠</x-key>的琴声<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>高碳钢</x-hw><x-pr> gāotàngāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>含碳量为0.6%—2%的碳素钢。强度、硬度高，塑性、韧性差，多用于制造工具、耐磨零件等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>是非窝</x-hw><x-pr> shìfēiwō</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>经常产生口舌、纠纷的地方<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>姨姥姥</x-hw><x-pr> yílǎolao</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>外祖母的姐妹<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>收报机</x-hw><x-pr> shōubàojī</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>接收电报的电信装置<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

钙化点 gàihuàdiǎn
名人和动物肌体某些组织发生钙化的部位。
见“钙化”。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>副性征</x-hw><x-pr> fùxìngzhēng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>第二性征<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>复元音</x-hw><x-pr> fùyuányīn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>同一个音节中连在一起的两个或两个以上的元音。如普通话韵母中的 ai、ua、uai<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说复合元音<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>腐殖酸</x-hw><x-pr> fǔzhísuān</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>由植物残体经过部分分解而形成的多种化合物的混合体。黑褐色，呈酸性。可用作肥料、土壤改良剂等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>吹火筒</x-hw><x-pr> chuīhuǒtǒng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>旧时一种用打通了竹节的竹筒做成的吹气助燃的器具<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>鼻旁窦</x-hw><x-pr> bípángdòu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>鼻窦的学名<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>鹤嘴镐</x-hw><x-pr> hèzuǐgǎo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>十字镐。镐头细长像鹤嘴，故称<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说鹤嘴锄<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>黑胶绸</x-hw><x-pr> hēijiāochóu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>莨（liáng）绸<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>崩龙族</x-hw><x-pr> bēnglóngzú</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>德昂族的旧称<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>洪泛区</x-hw><x-pr> hóngfànqū</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>江河两岸、湖泊周边因洪水泛滥而造成的受灾区域<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>迁移性</x-hw><x-pr> qiānyíxìng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>某些动物按一定的时间在一定的范围内迁移的习性。如大雁、燕子等候鸟就有这种习性<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>软罐头</x-hw><x-pr> ruǎnguàntou</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用软质材料（如塑料、铝箔等）密封包装的罐头<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>千分表</x-hw><x-pr> qiānfēnbiǎo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>利用齿轮传动或兼用杠杆原理制作的一种精密量具，由表针、表盘等组成，测量精度可达到0.001毫米。测量精度达0.01毫米的叫百分表<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>后滚翻</x-hw><x-pr> hòugǔnfān</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>一种体操动作。由蹲撑、含胸、低头姿势快速后倒，使身体向后滚动翻转<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>连脚裤</x-hw><x-pr> liánjiǎokù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>婴儿穿的一种裤子，裤筒下端缝合成袜状以包住脚<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>连通器</x-hw><x-pr> liántōngqì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>底部彼此连通的容器，同一种液体的水平面在容器内保持着相同的高度<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>咏史诗</x-hw><x-pr> yǒngshǐshī</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>泛指以历史为题材抒发个人情怀抱负的诗作<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>外来货</x-hw><x-pr> wàiláihuò</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>来自外地或外国的东西<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>冷脸子</x-hw><x-pr> lěngliǎnzi</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>冷面孔<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>我可不愿意去看人家的<x-key>冷脸子</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>外出血</x-hw><x-pr> wàichūxuè</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>从血管流出的血液排出身体以外。如鼻出血、咯血、子宫出血等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>呼之即来，挥之即去</x-hw><x-pr> hūzhījílái，huīzhījíqù</x-pr>
<dt>招呼就来，挥手就去。形容受人任意支使；也形容时刻听从调遣<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>明修栈道，暗度陈仓</x-hw><x-pr> míngxiū-zhàndào,àndùchéncāng</x-pr>
<dt>现在一般写作“明修栈道，暗渡陈仓”<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>三八国际劳动妇女节</x-hw><x-pr> sān-bā guójì láodòng fùnǚjié</x-pr>世界劳动妇女为争取民主、解放而斗争的纪念日。1909年3月8日，美国芝加哥女工举行罢工和示威游行，要求增加工资，实行8小时工作制和获得选举权。次年8月，在丹麦哥本哈根召开的国际第二次社会主义者妇女大会决定，以每年3月8日为国际劳动妇女节。简称妇女节、三八节<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>十目所视，十手所指</x-hw><x-pr> shímù-suǒshì,shíshǒu-suǒzhǐ</x-pr>
<dt>许多双眼睛盯着，许多只手指着。指一个人的言行逃不过众人的监督<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

cihui: 三个臭皮匠，赛过诸葛亮
raw_html:
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>三个臭皮匠，赛过诸葛亮</x-hw><x-pr> sān gè chòupíjiàng，sàiguò zhūgěliàng</x-pr>
<dt>比喻人多智慧多，大家一起想办法，就会有好主意<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>阻梗</x-hw><x-pr> zǔgěng</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>阻塞<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>河道<x-key>阻梗</x-key></x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 阻挠<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>屡遭<x-key>阻梗</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>呈阅</x-hw><x-pr> chéngyuè</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>恭敬地送给尊长审阅<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>夙仇</x-hw><x-pr> sùchóu</x-pr>
<dt>现在一般写作“宿仇”<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>退佃</x-hw><x-pr> tuìdiàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>地主收回租给农民的土地<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>承尘</x-hw><x-pr> chéngchén</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>天花板<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>规诫</x-hw><x-pr> guījiè</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>规劝告诫<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>婉言<x-key>规诫</x-key></x-ex></dd><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>不要写作“规戒”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>承管</x-hw><x-pr> chéngguǎn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>负责管理<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>居民小区的维修、卫生、治安等概由物业公司<x-key>承管</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>雷汞</x-hw><x-pr> léigǒng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>有机化合物，白色或灰色结晶，有毒，受到热、摩擦或冲击时，极易爆炸。可用来制雷管等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>尸蜡</x-hw><x-pr> shīlà</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>指埋葬多年后皮肤、肌肉尚未干枯腐朽的蜡状尸体<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>花秧</x-hw><x-pr> huāyāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>供移栽的花木幼株<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>涝害</x-hw><x-pr> làohài</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>由于雨水过多，农作物被淹而造成的灾害<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>讹舛</x-hw><x-pr> échuǎn</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>指文字上的错误<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>土籍</x-hw><x-pr> tǔjí</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>世代居住的籍贯（跟“客籍”相区别）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>谅察</x-hw><x-pr> liàngchá</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>谅解体察（多用于书信）<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>如有不恭，尚祈<x-key>谅察</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>涂乙</x-hw><x-pr> túyǐ</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>对文章进行修改（乙：勾画，即勾转颠倒的字或勾入补充的字）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>秃瓢<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> tūpiáor</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>头发脱光或剃光的头（含谐谑意）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>黝黯</x-hw><x-pr> yǒu'àn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>没有光亮；昏黑<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>黝黯</x-key>的墙角</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>谱号</x-hw><x-pr> pǔhào</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>确定五线谱上音高位置的符号。标在谱表的左端<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>画帖</x-hw><x-pr> huàtiè</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>学习绘画时供临摹用的范本<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>堆焊</x-hw><x-pr> duīhàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>用电弧焊、气焊、等离子焊等方法，把耐磨、耐腐蚀的金属熔敷在金属零件表面，以延长零件使用寿命<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>撩逗</x-hw><x-pr> liáodòu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>引逗；挑逗<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>孩子们互相<x-key>撩逗</x-key>着，嬉戏着<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>挡横<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> dǎnghèngr</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>横加干涉、阻拦<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>这个人怎么老在中间<x-key>挡横儿</x-key>?</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>抬秤</x-hw><x-pr> táichèng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>一种大型杆秤。用时把扁担或棍子从秤毫中穿过，由两个人抬着称重物<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>这担菜得用<x-key>抬秤</x-key>称<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>短欠</x-hw><x-pr> duǎnqiàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>亏欠<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>一年就<x-key>短欠</x-key>了上百万<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>筒裤</x-hw><x-pr> tǒngkù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>裤腿从上到下肥瘦大致相同、形状像筒的裤子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>铺衬</x-hw><x-pr> pūchèn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>铺垫衬托<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>有了次要人物的<x-key>铺衬</x-key>，主人公的形象更加突出<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd></dt><hr><dt class='title'><x-hw>铺衬</x-hw><x-pr> pūchen</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>指做袼褙、打补丁用的旧布块<x-er>儿</x-er><x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>倒嗓</x-hw><x-pr> dǎosǎng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>男性戏曲演员嗓音沙哑或失声，多出现在青春发育期<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说倒仓<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>盗录</x-hw><x-pr> dàolù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>未经版权所有者同意，擅自翻录音像制品<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>摊场</x-hw><x-pr> tāncháng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>把收割的庄稼在场地上摊开，以便翻晒或碾压<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>秤毫</x-hw><x-pr> chèngháo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>秤杆上用来提起杆秤的绳子或皮条<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说秤纽<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>荒歉</x-hw><x-pr> huāngqiàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>土地荒废，作物歉收<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>这片地连续<x-key>荒歉</x-key>了三年<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

羽缎 yǔduàn
名用细纱织成的有缎纹的棉织品。常做内衬、里子等。（也说羽毛缎。）

梃子 tǐngzi
名门框、窗框或门扇、窗扇两侧直立的边框。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>浪船</x-hw><x-pr> làngchuán</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>儿童游戏器械，支架上挂着船形装置，可以坐在上面来回摇荡<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>抵账</x-hw><x-pr> dǐzhàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>抵债<x-f>。</x-f></dt><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>不要写作“抵帐”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>跳箱</x-hw><x-pr> tiàoxiāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>名</x-gram>体育器械，由几节组成，整体形状像梯形的木箱<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 运动员通过助跑、踏跳，以各种姿势跳过跳箱<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>③</x-sn><x-g>名</x-g> 指这种竞技体操项目<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>揽总</x-hw><x-pr> lǎnzǒng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>总揽；全面掌握<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>后勤工作由他<x-key>揽总</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>电镐</x-hw><x-pr> diàngǎo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用电能作动力的采掘工具。用于开凿岩石、采矿等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>顶芽</x-hw><x-pr> dǐngyá</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>植物茎枝顶端的嫩芽<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>吃捧</x-hw><x-pr> chīpěng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>喜欢别人吹捧自己<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>鳞波</x-hw><x-pr> línbō</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>鱼鳞状的波纹<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>鳞波</x-key>闪烁</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>顶位</x-hw><x-pr> dǐngwèi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>峰位<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>顶命</x-hw><x-pr> dǐngmìng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>偿命<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>顶柜</x-hw><x-pr> dǐngguì</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>名</x-gram>放在立柜上面和立柜组成一体的柜子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>名</x-g> 吊柜<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>顶杠</x-hw><x-pr> dǐnggàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>争辩；抬杠<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>先把别人的话听完，别急着<x-key>顶杠</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>悔约</x-hw><x-pr> huǐyuē</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>对已签订的条约或作出的承诺表示反悔，要求取消<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>介虫</x-hw><x-pr> jièchóng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>身体外部有甲壳的动物。如虾、蟹等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>借位</x-hw><x-pr> jièwèi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>数学上指在减法运算中，被减数的某一位小于减数时，向前一位的数借1，合成本位的数，然后再减该位减数<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

飘绿 piāolǜ
动指股票等证券的价格普遍下跌。因下跌时证券交易厅的电子价格显示屏用绿色数字显示，故称（跟“飘红”相对）。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>椰蓉</x-hw><x-pr> yēróng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用晾干的椰子肉制成的粉状物，可用来做糕点糖果等的配料<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>椰蓉</x-key>月饼</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>明贴</x-hw><x-pr> míngtiē</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>明补<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>恚恨</x-hw><x-pr> huìhèn</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>愤恨；怨恨<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>无比<x-key>恚恨</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>箬笠</x-hw><x-pr> ruòlì</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用箬竹的篾、叶编成的帽子<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>青<x-key>箬笠</x-key>，绿蓑衣</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>痴长</x-hw><x-pr> chīzhǎng</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>谦词，称自己白白地活了多少岁<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 谦词，称自己比别人白白地大了多少岁<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>我比你<x-key>痴长</x-key>几岁，要劝你几句<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>陵替</x-hw><x-pr> língtì</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>纲纪废弛不振<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>法制<x-key>陵替</x-key></x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 衰败；衰落<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>纲常<x-key>陵替</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>表汗</x-hw><x-pr> biǎohàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>中医指服用药物使身体出汗，以把体内所受的风寒发散出来<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>浸取</x-hw><x-pr> jìnqǔ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>用溶液浸泡固体混合物，从中提取某些成分。如用水或其他溶剂浸泡出中草药材所含的有效成分，用某种溶剂浸取矿物中的稀有元素<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>领钩</x-hw><x-pr> lǐnggōu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>扣紧衣领的小钩。钩和环分别钉在衣领的两边<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>怨敌</x-hw><x-pr> yuàndí</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>仇敌；仇人<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>傍亮<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> bàngliàngr</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>快到天亮的时候<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>天<x-key>傍亮儿</x-key>，前沿部队就和敌人交火了<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>绵连</x-hw><x-pr> miánlián</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>延续不断<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>绵连</x-key>百余里</x-ex></dd><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>不要写作“绵联”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>领奏</x-hw><x-pr> lǐngzòu</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>合奏时带头演奏<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>名</x-g> 领奏的人<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>瞎炮</x-hw><x-pr> xiāpào</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>发射出去没有爆炸的炮弹；施工爆破中没有爆炸的炮<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说哑炮<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>历陈</x-hw><x-pr> lìchén</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>一条一条地陈说<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>历陈</x-key>功过</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>活校</x-hw><x-pr> huójiào</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>出版校对工作中按原稿校对的同时，也检查原稿有无错误（跟“死校”相对）<x-f>。</x-f></dt><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>“校”这里不读 xiào<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

晕场 yùnchǎng
动在考场或舞台上由于过度紧张或其他原因而头晕。
天热预防考生晕场。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>煤砖</x-hw><x-pr> méizhuān</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>煤末掺黏土加水制成的砖形煤块，用作燃料<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>橘柑</x-hw><x-pr> júgān</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>某些地区指橘子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

果饵 guǒ'ěr
名糖果、点心等食品的总称。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>拒聘</x-hw><x-pr> jùpìn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>不接受聘用或聘任<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>因不满意公司的待遇，他<x-key>拒聘</x-key>了<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>帽筒</x-hw><x-pr> màotǒng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>放置帽子的器具。圆筒形，多为瓷制<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>细火</x-hw><x-pr> xìhuǒ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>微火；小火<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>用<x-key>细火</x-key>焖熟</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>涓埃</x-hw><x-pr> juān'āi</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>细小的水流和尘埃。比喻极其微小的事物<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>涓埃</x-key>之功</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>毛蚴</x-hw><x-pr> máoyòu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>扁形动物吸虫类初生的幼虫，绝大多数体表密覆纤毛。血吸虫卵便是在水中孵化成毛蚴，后变成尾蚴钻入人体为害<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>扩放</x-hw><x-pr> kuòfàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>用底片放大照片<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 通过电子设备把声音或图像放大<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>猫鱼</x-hw><x-pr> māoyú</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用来喂猫的小鱼；也指小而廉价的鱼<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>祸种</x-hw><x-pr> huòzhǒng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>引起灾祸的人或事<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>眷注</x-hw><x-pr> juànzhù</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>关怀<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>承蒙<x-key>眷注</x-key>，铭感不忘<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

曼延 mànyán
①动连绵不断地向远处延伸（多用于山脉、水流、道路等）。
山脉曼延千余里
②见“蔓延”。现在一般写作“蔓延”。

谲诈 juézhà〈文〉
形奸猾诡诈。
为人谲诈阴险

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>咔唑</x-hw><x-pr> kǎzuò</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>有机化合物，难溶于水及其他溶剂，是制作染料、合成塑料等的原料<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>戏侮</x-hw><x-pr> xìwǔ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>戏弄欺侮<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>斥卖</x-hw><x-pr> chìmài</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>卖掉<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>斥卖</x-key>庄园</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>箬竹</x-hw><x-pr> ruòzhú</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>竹子的一种。叶子宽而大，可用来编制器具或斗笠，也可用来包粽子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>散套</x-hw><x-pr> sǎntào</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>一种散曲，由同一个宫调的若干支曲子组成的套曲<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>亏累</x-hw><x-pr> kuīlěi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>连续亏空<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>不堪<x-key>亏累</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>液果</x-hw><x-pr> yèguǒ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>肉果的旧称<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>绺窃</x-hw><x-pr> liǔqiè</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>从别人身上偷东西<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>将正在<x-key>绺窃</x-key>的扒手当场抓获<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>伴宿</x-hw><x-pr> bànsù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>陪伴过夜<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>陪床<x-key>伴宿</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>洗盐</x-hw><x-pr> xǐyán</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>用灌水冲洗等方法除去盐碱地里过多的盐碱成分<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说洗碱<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>糟改</x-hw><x-pr> zāogǎi</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>胡乱修改或改编<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 某些地区指取笑、奚落<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>别<x-key>糟改</x-key>人</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>萱堂</x-hw><x-pr> xuāntáng</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>栽有萱草的住房，一般是北屋，多为母亲所居，因此借指母亲<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>宽让</x-hw><x-pr> kuānràng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>宽容忍让<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>对朋友要<x-key>宽让</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>冲子</x-hw><x-pr> chòngzi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>一种用金属制成的打孔工具<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

裁编 cáibiān
动裁减编制。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>采捞</x-hw><x-pr> cǎilāo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>从水中捞取有用的水生动植物等<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>潜入海底<x-key>采捞</x-key>稀有贝类<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>笼嘴</x-hw><x-pr> lóngzuǐ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>戴在牲口嘴上以防使役时乱吃东西的网状器具，多用麻绳或铁丝等编织而成<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说箍嘴<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>轧场</x-hw><x-pr> yàcháng</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>用碌碡等压平、压实场地<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 用碌碡等滚压场上的谷物使脱粒<x-f>。</x-f></dt><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>“场”这里不读 chǎng<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>烜赫</x-hw><x-pr> xuǎnhè</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>形容声势浩大，名声显赫<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>战功<x-key>烜赫</x-key></x-ex><x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb><x-key>烜赫</x-key>一时</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>修浚</x-hw><x-pr> xiūjùn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>整修（水道）使通畅<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>修浚</x-key>航道</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>挎斗</x-hw><x-pr> kuàdǒu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>附在摩托车右边的斗状装置，可以坐人、载物<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>啪唧</x-hw><x-pr> pājī</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>拟声</x-gram>模拟气体或液体猛然被挤出的声音<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>他在泥水里<x-key>啪唧</x-key><x-key>啪唧</x-key>地走着<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>闪让</x-hw><x-pr> shǎnràng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>迅速避让<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>闪让</x-key>不及，给撞上了<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>备鞍</x-hw><x-pr> bèi'ān</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>给骡马等牲口装配鞍子，以备骑乘或驮东西<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>菜禽</x-hw><x-pr> càiqín</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>肉禽<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>菜蚜</x-hw><x-pr> càiyá</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>主要危害甘蓝、芥菜、萝卜等蔬菜的蚜虫<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>沤粪</x-hw><x-pr> òufèn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>将人、畜的粪便或植物茎叶放在池中使发酵制成肥料<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>伤耗</x-hw><x-pr> shānghao</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>损伤消耗<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>鸡蛋在运输过程中<x-key>伤耗</x-key>太大</x-ex><x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb>减少<x-key>伤耗</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>捕拿</x-hw><x-pr> bǔná</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>捉拿<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>捕拿</x-key>凶犯</x-ex></dd>
