<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>拉买卖</x-hw><x-pr> lāmǎimai</x-pr>
<dt>想方设法招引顾客<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>到车站、码头给旅馆<x-key>拉买卖</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>拉亏空</x-hw><x-pr> lākuīkong</x-pr>
<dt>欠债<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>门插关<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> ménchāguanr</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>安在旧式门上的短门闩<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>捧臭脚</x-hw><x-pr> pěngchòujiǎo</x-pr>
<dt>比喻无耻吹捧<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>杜绝文艺评论中的<x-key>捧臭脚</x-key>现象<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>聚花果</x-hw><x-pr> jùhuāguǒ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>果实的一种。由生长在一个花序上的许多花的子房及其他花器官共同发育成的果实。如桑椹、无花果、菠萝等的果实<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说复果<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>铆钉枪</x-hw><x-pr> mǎodīngqiāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>风动工具，形状略像枪，用来锤击、挤压铆钉，连接构件<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>虚套子</x-hw><x-pr> xūtàozi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>空有形式而无实在内容的应酬礼数<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说虚套<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>杂和菜</x-hw><x-pr> záhuocài</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>把剩下的各种菜混合在一起加热做成的菜<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>花信风</x-hw><x-pr> huāxìnfēng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>开花期间吹来的风。古人认为，从小寒到谷雨共有8个节气120天，其间每隔5天会有一种花开放，应花期吹来的风似乎就在传递着这种花开放的信息。所以民间有“二十四番花信风”的说法<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说花信<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>麦淇淋</x-hw><x-pr> màiqílín</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram><x-etym>英语 margarine 音译<x-f>。</x-f></x-etym>用氢化植物油和脱脂牛奶等配制成的黄白色固体，是黄油的代用品<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>网状脉</x-hw><x-pr> wǎngzhuàngmài</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>指像网一样互相连接交错的叶脉。大多数双子叶植物的叶都有网状脉<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>大路活<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> dàlùhuór</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>指技术要求不高的一般活计<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>千分数</x-hw><x-pr> qiānfēnshù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>分母为1000的分数。可用千分号（‰）表示，如5/1000写为5‰<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>游侣</x-hw><x-pr> yóulǚ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>一同旅游的伴侣<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>游侣</x-key>成群</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>保健箱</x-hw><x-pr> bǎojiànxiāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>医务人员出诊时随身携带的装有常备药品和医疗器械的小箱子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>鹦哥绿</x-hw><x-pr> yīnggēlǜ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>形容颜色像鹦鹉羽毛一样绿<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>保险盒</x-hw><x-pr> bǎoxiǎnhé</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>电路中装有保险丝和开关装置的小盒<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>宇航器</x-hw><x-pr> yǔhángqì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>航天器<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>盘<x-er>儿</x-er>菜</x-hw><x-pr> pánrcài</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>经过初步加工调配按盘出售的菜肴，买回后即可直接烹炒<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>硬包装</x-hw><x-pr> yìngbāozhuāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>用硬质材料（如白铁皮、薄木板、玻璃瓶等）对产品进行包装（跟“软包装”相对）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>名</x-g> 指用于硬包装的材料或经过硬包装的产品<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>腽肭兽</x-hw><x-pr> wànàshòu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>海狗<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>龙脑树</x-hw><x-pr> lóngnǎoshù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>常绿乔木，叶卵形，花白色，芳香，圆锥花序，果实含一粒种子。树干经蒸馏后所得的结晶称为龙脑或冰片，中医用作芳香开窍药<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>打闷雷</x-hw><x-pr> dǎmènléi</x-pr>
<dt>比喻不明事情底细，心里瞎猜疑<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>你给大家交个底，省得我们<x-key>打闷雷</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>水鳖子</x-hw><x-pr> shuǐbiēzi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>鲎（hòu）虫的俗称<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>唇线笔</x-hw><x-pr> chúnxiànbǐ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用来描唇线的笔状化妆品，有多种颜色<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说唇笔<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>鸭嘴笔</x-hw><x-pr> yāzuǐbǐ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>绘图时画线用的笔。笔头<x-er>儿</x-er>由一片直的和一片弧形的钢片相合组成，略呈鸭嘴状，故称<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>蔫呼呼</x-hw><x-pr> niānhūhū</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>形容人性子慢，说话、做事不干脆<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>这人总是<x-key>蔫呼呼</x-key>的，没一点<x-er>儿</x-er>利索劲<x-er>儿</x-er><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>工业链</x-hw><x-pr> gōngyèliàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>呈链带状分布的工业区域，其生产项目往往具有连带关系<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>伯祖母</x-hw><x-pr> bózǔmǔ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>父亲的伯母<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>小猫熊</x-hw><x-pr> xiǎomāoxióng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>小熊猫的学名<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

树阴凉儿 shùyīnliángr
名树下面阳光晒不到的地方。
在树阴凉儿里歇一下。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>强心药</x-hw><x-pr> qiángxīnyào</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>能增强心脏机能，使心肌收缩力增强、心脏搏动频率减缓，从而改善血液循环的药物。如蟾酥、洋地黄等，多用于抢救危重病人<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说强心剂<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>螺丝扣</x-hw><x-pr> luósīkòu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>螺纹②<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>闯乱子</x-hw><x-pr> chuǎngluànzi</x-pr>
<dt>惹出麻烦，引起纠纷<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>这样做非<x-key>闯乱子</x-key>不可<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>克郎球</x-hw><x-pr> kèlángqiú</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>康乐球<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>疥蛤蟆</x-hw><x-pr> jièháma</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>蟾蜍的俗称<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>借代义</x-hw><x-pr> jièdàiyì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>某个词语经常被用作借代而相对固定下来的意义。如“红领巾”的借代义是少先队员；“白大褂”的借代义是医生<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>橡皮线</x-hw><x-pr> xiàngpíxiàn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>一种外面包着橡胶的电线<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说皮线<x-f>。</x-f>）

壳郎猪 kélangzhū〈口〉
名架子猪；还没有长膘的半大猪。

什不闲儿 shíbùxiánr
名一种曲艺，由莲花落（lào）发展而成，曾流行于北京、天津、河北等地区。用锣、鼓、铙、钹等多种乐器伴奏，演出形式有一人的单唱和二三人的彩唱两种。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>病西施</x-hw><x-pr> bìngxīshī</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>借指带有病态的美人（西施：春秋时期越国的美女，后人把她当作绝色美女的代称。相传西施生病时更美）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>交通岛</x-hw><x-pr> jiāotōngdǎo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>设在十字路口中间的小平台，供警察站在上面指挥交通<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>绿生生</x-hw><x-pr> lǜshēngshēng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>形容碧绿而鲜嫩的样子<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>绿生生</x-key>的麦苗</x-ex><x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb>顶花带刺<x-er>儿</x-er>的黄瓜<x-key>绿生生</x-key>的<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>香水梨</x-hw><x-pr> xiāngshuǐlí</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>梨的一种。果皮呈黄绿色，成熟时为纯黄色，果肉略有涩味，产于我国辽宁和河北的东部<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

那摩温 nàmówēn
名英语 number one 音译。旧时某些地区指工头。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>暌离</x-hw><x-pr> kuílí</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>暌隔；离散<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>难堪<x-key>暌离</x-key>之苦</x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 违背<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>暌离</x-key>常理</x-ex></dd>

已决犯 yǐjuéfàn
名已经由法院判定罪刑的犯人。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>马丁炉</x-hw><x-pr> mǎdīnglú</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>平炉<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>羊蝎子</x-hw><x-pr> yángxiēzi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>供食用的羊腔骨，肉瘦而鲜嫩。因形状像蝎子，故称<x-f>。</x-f></dt><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>“蝎”不要误写作“羯”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>砍头疮</x-hw><x-pr> kǎntóuchuāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>指长在脖子后部的痈。因脖子经常扭动，不易治愈<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说砍头痈<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>素昔</x-hw><x-pr> sùxī</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>副</x-gram>素来<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>黄水疮</x-hw><x-pr> huángshuǐchuāng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>中医指一种皮肤病。初起时皮肤上出现米样小疱，四周略有红晕，发痒，搔破后出黄水。多发生于小儿头、面、耳、颈等部位。包括脓疱疮与湿疹<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>惭怍</x-hw><x-pr> cánzuò</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>羞惭不安<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>惭怍</x-key>不已</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>遛早<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> liùzǎor</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>早晨散步<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>蒿子秆<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> hāozigǎnr</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>食用茼蒿的嫩茎<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>抿子</x-hw><x-pr> mǐnzi</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>旧时妇女给头发抹油或水用的小刷子<x-f>。</x-f></dt><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>不宜写作“笢子”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>料豆<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> liàodòur</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>喂牲口的黑豆、黄豆等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>教养员</x-hw><x-pr> jiàoyǎngyuán</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>幼儿园里负责儿童教育工作的教师<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>推度</x-hw><x-pr> tuīduó</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>推测揣度<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>由他的表情可以<x-key>推度</x-key>他的心理<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>“度”这里不读 dù<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>蛀心虫</x-hw><x-pr> zhùxīnchóng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>二化螟、三化螟、大螟、玉米螟等幼虫的统称。蛀蚀作物幼苗的苗心，造成枯心苗，故称<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说钻心虫<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>佃租</x-hw><x-pr> diànzū</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>佃户向地主交纳的地租<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>字帖<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> zìtiěr</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>写有简单话语的帖子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>五分制</x-hw><x-pr> wǔfēnzhì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>学校评定学生成绩的一种方法。共分五个等级，五分最高，为优等；四分为良好；三分为及格；二分和一分为不及格<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>捡漏<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> jiǎnlòur</x-pr>〈口〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>抓住对方的漏洞加以利用<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>他们这次是靠<x-key>捡漏儿</x-key>踢进了一球<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>花子<x-er>儿</x-er></x-hw><x-pr> huāzǐr</x-pr>
<dt>现在一般写作“花籽<x-er>儿</x-er>”<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>无大无小</x-hw><x-pr> wúdà-wúxiǎo</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn>无论大小<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>事情<x-key>无大无小</x-key>，都要认真干<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn>没大没小<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>赔话</x-hw><x-pr> péihuà</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>赔不是；说道歉的话<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>儿子闯了祸，爸爸替他去给人家<x-key>赔话</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>推宕</x-hw><x-pr> tuīdàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>拖延搁置<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>敷衍<x-key>推宕</x-key></x-ex></dd>

滂湃 pāngpài
形形容水势浩大的样子。
滂湃江水滚滚东流。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>魁岸</x-hw><x-pr> kuí'àn</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>魁梧高大<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>体态<x-key>魁岸</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>生圹</x-hw><x-pr> shēngkuàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>生前建造的墓穴<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

侧棱 zhāileng〈口〉
动向一侧倾斜。
侧棱着身子躺在床上。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>推刨</x-hw><x-pr> tuī bào</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>刨子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>青蚨</x-hw><x-pr> qīngfú</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>传说中的一种虫子，母子不相离。用其血涂铜钱，钱花了会自动飞回来。后用“青蚨”借指铜钱<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

哄逗 hǒngdòu
动用话语或举动逗引人，使人高兴。
哄逗着小孙子玩儿。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>侈欲</x-hw><x-pr> chǐyù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>过分的欲望（多指私欲）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>押禁</x-hw><x-pr> yājìn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>拘押禁闭<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>先把犯罪嫌疑人<x-key>押禁</x-key>起来候审<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>沉绵</x-hw><x-pr> chénmián</x-pr>〈文〉

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>沉勇</x-hw><x-pr> chényǒng</x-pr>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>洽妥</x-hw><x-pr> qiàtuǒ</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>商量完毕，有了结论<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>有关出版事宜，双方已经<x-key>洽妥</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>侧闻</x-hw><x-pr> cèwén</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>谦词，表示在尊长的身边听到（他的教诲）<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex><x-key>侧闻</x-key>公之高论</x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 从侧面听到（多指传闻）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>渔钩</x-hw><x-pr> yúgōu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>钓鱼的钩子。多呈弯曲状，前端有倒刺<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>品议</x-hw><x-pr> pǐnyì</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>品评<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>誓辞</x-hw><x-pr> shìcí</x-pr>
<dt>现在一般写作“誓词”<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>球刀</x-hw><x-pr> qiúdāo</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>冰球运动员所穿冰鞋上装置的钢质冰刀，用来在冰面上滑行<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>缸砖</x-hw><x-pr> gāngzhuān</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用陶土烧制的砖。多是暗红色，质地细密耐磨，易洗刷<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>粗选</x-hw><x-pr> cūxuǎn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>（对矿物原料等）进行初步分选<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>彪壮</x-hw><x-pr> biāozhuàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>形</x-gram>魁梧健壮<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>身材<x-key>彪壮</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>测候</x-hw><x-pr> cèhòu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>观测天文和气象<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>全天<x-key>测候</x-key></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>瞎诌</x-hw><x-pr> xiāzhōu</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>没有根据地胡编乱说<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>哪有这样的事，纯粹是<x-key>瞎诌</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>违忤</x-hw><x-pr> wéiwǔ</x-pr>〈文〉
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>不顺从；违背（上级或长辈）<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>违误</x-hw><x-pr> wéiwù</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>违反指令，耽误公事<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>此件务必及时送到，不得<x-key>违误</x-key><x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>

驰报 chíbào
动迅速报告；迅速通报。
事关全局，立即向总部驰报 | 此件驰报各地

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>陈账</x-hw><x-pr> chénzhàng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>很久以前的债；老账<x-f>。</x-f></dt><x-dd>▷</x-dd><x-ex>父亲欠下的<x-key>陈账</x-key></x-ex><x-lb> | </x-lb>◇两人一吵架就翻<x-key>陈账</x-key><x-f>。</x-f><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>不要写作“陈帐”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>槽床</x-hw><x-pr> cáochuáng</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>名</x-gram>用来安放槽的架子或台子<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

杂遝 zátà
现在规范词形写作“杂沓”。

凫茈 fúcí〈文〉
名荸荠。

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>扭扯</x-hw><x-pr> niǔchě</x-pr>
<dt><x-sn>①</x-sn><x-gram>动</x-gram>互相揪住；彼此拉扯<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>两人互相<x-key>扭扯</x-key>起来<x-f>。</x-f></x-ex></dd>
<dt><x-sn>②</x-sn><x-g>动</x-g> 彼此纠缠搅和<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>你和他<x-key>扭扯</x-key>在一起有什么好处?</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>屏迹</x-hw><x-pr> bǐngjì</x-pr>〈文〉

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>依允</x-hw><x-pr> yīyǔn</x-pr>
<dt><x-gram>动</x-gram>听从；同意<x-f>。</x-f></dt><dd><x-ex>你就<x-key>依允</x-key>了他吧!</x-ex></dd>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>觱篥</x-hw><x-pr> bìlì</x-pr>
<dt>现在一般写作“筚篥”<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>龟年鹤寿</x-hw><x-pr> guīnián-hèshòu</x-pr>
<dt>像乌龟和仙鹤一样长寿。常用作老人生日时的贺词<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>尧天舜日</x-hw><x-pr> yáotiān-shùnrì</x-pr>
<dt>日子过得就像尧舜在位时一样。形容太平盛世，国泰民安<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>镂月裁云</x-hw><x-pr> lòuyuè-cáiyún</x-pr>
<dt>镂刻月亮，剪裁云彩。形容技艺精巧高超<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>耳软心活</x-hw><x-pr> ěrruǎn-xīnhuó</x-pr>形容容易轻信别人的话而改变主意<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>灯蛾扑火</x-hw><x-pr> dēng'é-pūhuǒ</x-pr>
<dt>飞蛾扑火<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>快步流星</x-hw><x-pr> kuàibù-liúxīng</x-pr>
<dt>大步流星<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>辐照食品</x-hw><x-pr> fúzhào shípǐn</x-pr>
<dt>经过辐照的食品。辐照后杀虫、灭菌率可达100%，宜于保存<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>茶叶食品</x-hw><x-pr> cháyèshípǐn</x-pr>
<dt>添加茶水制成的食品。如茶叶糖果、茶叶果脯、茶叶果冻、茶水羹等<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>鸠形鹄面</x-hw><x-pr> jiūxíng-húmiàn</x-pr>身体像斑鸠（肚子低陷，胸骨凸出），脸像黄鹄（一点<x-er>儿</x-er>肉都没有）。形容人因饥饿而身体瘦削、面容憔悴<x-f>。</x-f>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>恣行无忌</x-hw><x-pr> zìxíng-wújì</x-pr>
<dt>放纵言行，没有顾忌<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>老牛舐犊</x-hw><x-pr> lǎoniú-shìdú</x-pr>
<dt>老牛舔小牛。比喻父母疼爱子女<x-f>。</x-f></dt><t-note><x-lb>用法说明</x-lb>“舐”不要误写作“舔”<x-f>。</x-f></t-note>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>顺风转舵</x-hw><x-pr> shùnfēng-zhuǎnduò</x-pr>
<dt>随风转舵<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>画虎类犬</x-hw><x-pr> huàhǔ-lèiquǎn</x-pr>
<dt>画虎不成反而像狗。比喻模仿别人不到家，反而弄巧成拙，留下笑柄<x-f>。</x-f></dt>（也说画虎类狗<x-f>。</x-f>）

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>抚躬自问</x-hw><x-pr> fǔgōng-zìwèn</x-pr>
<dt>反躬自问<x-f>。</x-f></dt>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>斗转参横</x-hw><x-pr> dǒuzhuǎn-shēnhéng</x-pr>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>粉白黛黑</x-hw><x-pr> fěnbái-dàihēi</x-pr>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>听风是雨</x-hw><x-pr> tīngfēng-shìyǔ</x-pr>

<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="HYGF2.css"><script src='HYGF2.js'></script><x-hw>电子防御</x-hw><x-pr> diànzǐ fángyù</x-pr>
<dt>在电子对抗中，为保护己方电子设备和系统的正常效能而采取的措施和行动<x-f>。</x-f></dt>
